hero.label: Made for Ocular AI
hero.headline: I want to help Ocular AI build its first sales engine.
hero.subheadline: Ocular AI is tackling a real bottleneck in AI by turning messy multi modal data into high quality datasets for LLMs, computer vision, and enterprise models. That makes the Founding SDR role exciting to me because I would be helping create top of funnel motion for a technical product with clear market urgency.

whyCompany.title: Ocular AI solves a core data problem for modern AI
whyCompany.body: Your platform sits at a critical layer of the AI stack by helping teams transform unstructured data into golden datasets. I also like that Ocular AI goes beyond annotation with managed GPU training pipelines, evaluation workflows, and access to domain experts.

whyCompany.title: Founding SDR is a rare chance to shape go to market
whyCompany.body: At this stage, every outbound message, target account decision, and qualification insight matters. Joining a YC backed team with only a handful of employees means I could contribute directly to how Ocular AI builds repeatable pipeline from the beginning.

whyCompany.title: My BDR background fits this early outbound challenge
whyCompany.body: At Copygen.ai, I worked cold outbound using HubSpot and LinkedIn sequences and helped bring in 15 to 20 paying clients. Then at NextAfter, I sharpened my digital marketing and messaging skills in a B2B environment, which would help me connect Ocular AI's technical value to the right prospects.

quote: I want this role because it is not just about booking meetings. It is about helping a strong technical team turn real product value into an early sales motion that compounds.
